'''zhadhufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyle|kyle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyle|kyle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhadhufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhædhifith|zhædhifith]] || [[word:zhædhifij|zhædhifij]] || [[word:zhædhifish|zhædhifish]] || [[word:zhædhifi|zhædhifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhadhudhufuth|zhadhudhufuth]] || [[word:zhadhudhufuj|zhadhudhufuj]] || [[word:zhadhudhufush|zhadhudhufush]] || [[word:zhadhudhufu|zhadhudhufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhadhufuth|zhadhufuth]] || [[word:zhadhufuj|zhadhufuj]] || [[word:zhadhufush|zhadhufush]] || [[word:zhadhufu|zhadhufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhadhuffuth|zhadhuffuth]] || [[word:zhadhuffuj|zhadhuffuj]] || [[word:zhadhuffush|zhadhuffush]] || [[word:zhadhuffuf|zhadhuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhadhufuthu|zhadhufuthu]] || [[word:zhadhufuju|zhadhufuju]] || [[word:zhadhufushu|zhadhufushu]] || [[word:zhadhufuku|zhadhufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhadhufuth|zhadhufuth]] || [[word:zhadhufuj|zhadhufuj]] || [[word:zhadhufush|zhadhufush]] || [[word:zhadhufu|zhadhufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhadhufuthul|zhadhufuthul]] || [[word:zhadhufujul|zhadhufujul]] || [[word:zhadhufushul|zhadhufushul]] || [[word:zhadhufukul|zhadhufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhadhufuthuthu|zhadhufuthuthu]] || [[word:zhadhufujuju|zhadhufujuju]] || [[word:zhadhufushushu|zhadhufushushu]] || [[word:zhadhufuku|zhadhufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhadhufuthun|zhadhufuthun]] || [[word:zhadhufujun|zhadhufujun]] || [[word:zhadhufushun|zhadhufushun]] || [[word:zhadhufukun|zhadhufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhadhufuthuoro|zhadhufuthuoro]] || [[word:zhadhufujuoro|zhadhufujuoro]] || [[word:zhadhufushuoro|zhadhufushuoro]] || [[word:zhadhufukuoro|zhadhufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
